text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Disaster Services > Disaster Loans * Agricultural Issues 1 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Refine Results - Select - No Filter Agricultural Issues Business Issues Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF UNITED STATES DEPARTMENT OF AGRICULTURE UNITED STATES DEPARTMENT OF AGRICULTURE RURAL DEVELOPMENT OREGON STATE EMERGENCY FARM LOANS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides emergency loans to restore or replace essential property and living expenses, cover production costs, reorganize operations, or refinance certain debts when a natural disaster is declared by the Secretary of Agriculture or by the President under the Stafford Act. 1220 SW 3rd Avenue Suite 1801 Portland, OR 97204 Eligibility: Varies Hours: Not applicable Email Get Directions Visit Website More Details UNITED STATES DEPARTMENT OF AGRICULTURE EMERGENCY FARM LOANS
